Manifestos da Equipe

Semana 14
Nossa identidade
Sobre a EIC
Missão, Visão e Valores que guiam cada aula
Missão · Por que existimos
To develop confident English communicators, connecting people to cultures, opportunities and the world — through a humanized, innovative and transformative learning experience.
Visão · Para onde vamos
To be the reference English school in Vargem Grande Paulista and the region, recognized for teaching excellence, real impact on students' lives, and a culture of continuous innovation.
Valores · Em ação em cada aula
Empathy
Learn every student's name, story, and goal by week 2.
Respect
Never correct a student in a way that makes others laugh at them.
Innovation
Replace at least one book activity per week with something real.
Interculturality
Bring authentic content — videos, music, news — every class.
Excellence
Prepare every lesson as if it's the most important one you'll ever teach.
Engagement
Make sure every student speaks at least once in every class.
"
A escola que queremos ser começa com a equipe que somos hoje.
The school we want to be starts with the team we are today.
